name: Revinate Hotel Guest Intelligence API
what_it_does: Revinate REST API for hotel guest intelligence, reputation management, and CRM platform. Enables AI agents to access guest profiles and stay history, retrieve review and reputation data from OTA channels, manage guest communication campaigns, analyze sentiment from online reviews, sync PMS guest data with marketing workflows, and integrate hotel CRM data with loyalty and revenue management systems.
use_cases: Accessing guest profiles and historical stay data from hotel CRM agents
Retrieving and analyzing online reviews from reputation monitoring agents
Managing personalized guest communication campaigns from marketing automation agents
Syncing PMS guest data with marketing lists from hotel outreach agents
not_for: Property management without guest-facing hospitality CRM needs
Short-term vacation rental without hotel enterprise marketing workflows
Restaurant or spa management without hotel property integration
best_when: A hotel or hotel group wants AI agents to monitor online reputation, personalize guest communications based on stay history, and automate post-stay survey and re-engagement campaigns.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal data and stay history is highly sensitive. OTA review data has platform data sharing restrictions. Automated guest marketing must comply with CAN-SPAM and CASL.

auth.notes: Revinate uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Property-level credentials. Partner program for PMS and technology integrations. Scopes control access to guest data, reviews, and campaign management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — hotel technology enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property annual pricing; enterprise pricing for hotel groups
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based, founded 2009. Hotel-focused guest intelligence and reputation management. Strong in independent hotels and boutique hotel groups. Competes with Medallia and TrustYou for reputation management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest personal data and stay history is highly sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
OTA review data (TripAdvisor, Booking.com, Google) has platform data sharing restrictions
Automated guest marketing campaigns must comply with CAN-SPAM, CASL, GDPR
PMS integration required for guest profile enrichment — dual API surface
US/EU data residency options — verify for international hotel operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hotel guest personal data and stay history. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with property-level scoping. US/EU data residency. OTA review data platform restrictions apply.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel guest personal and stay data. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. OTA data sharing restrictions.
